title: A Loving God prevents creature battles for three turn cycles

card.rawText: Creatures cannot battle for 3 turn cycles.

plan.title: A Loving God prevents creature battles for three turn cycles
plan.summary: Resolve field magic and verify combat attacks are blocked for all creatures until duration expires.

notes: Use post-first-turn-cycle state to avoid confusing with normal first-turn battle lock.
Action type currently has no registered runtime route.

steps: Play A Loving God as field magic.
Advance to COMBAT and attempt player_1 creature battle.
Advance through player_2 turns and subsequent cycles, attempting battles while lock is active.
At beginning of player_1 turn after three full turn cycles, attempt battle again.

expectedAssertions.label: Battle lock removed after three cycles

manualVerification: Confirm field-duration magic remains tracked for duration even though it is standard magic.
riskNotes: Unsupported action type may mean no play button, no global effect, or no combat prevention.

coverageSuggestion.notes: No runtime route registered for global battle lock.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
